reviews.review_msg: I liked attending class because Neil was pretty funny. Be sure to participate lots - it matters. No midtermfinal but two assignments in their place, 1 group project w presentation too. Make sure you read the cases and come to class prepared will help you. Make friends & work on the assignments together, it helps a lot.

Attend lecture to get the most out of class, and participate  since it's an easy way to get marks. Neil is pretty entertaining in class anyways. The biggest problem came with the hand-in business case assignments... If you don't have his answer then you're wrong. Also, he's obsessed with Asia.

Daniela is great. 340 is a pretty social class, the semester-long group assignment is pretty fun, the lectures involve a lot of discussion and relation to real world examples. Assignments are dead easy, but the midterm is hard. Great for business minors. Cruised to an easy B. If you put in the time this class is definitely not a hard A.
Some lectures were truly great, some a little less than.  Dani works hard and you won't regret taking 340 with her.
Rui knows a lot about the subject matter. His experience and cases are amazing. I wish more profs teach like Rui. He only uses his own cases in class and they are so interesting
Typically uses real-world examples which helps give meaning as to why we're learning these things. Easy to approach and ask questions. Great prof overall
She's great. Straight forward lectures, made them engaging enough. Always had enough time to work on everything, clear instructions. cant complain. def recommend.
